chapter_title.en: Chapter on What is Permissible and Impermissible to Wear in the State of Ihram

text: 2631 - وَ سَأَلَهُ مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ عَلِيٍّ اَلْحَلَبِيُّ : عَنِ اَلْمَرْأَةِ إِذَا أَحْرَمَتْ أَتَلْبَسُ اَلسَّرَاوِيلَ؟ فَقَالَ: «نَعَمْ إِنَّمَا تُرِيدُ بِذَلِكَ اَلسَّتْرَ ».

en.bab-ul-qaim-publications:
Hadith.2631 - Muhammad ibn Ali al-Halabi asked Imam (as) about a woman in Ihram: "Can she wear trousers (sarawil)?"
Imam (as) replied: "Yes, as she intends by that to maintain modesty."
